scripts.build:ts: bun run --filter './packages/core' build && bun run --filter './packages/theming' build && bun run --filter './packages/runtime' build && bun run --filter './packages/system' build && bun run --filter './packages/vite-plugin' build
scripts.build:all: bun run build:extract && bun run build:ts
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean:full && bun run build:all
scripts.compile: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/theming/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/system/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/vite-plugin/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/showcase/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.verify: bun run build:ts && bun run compile && bun test && bun run test:types && bun run check
scripts.verify:full: bun run build:all && bun test && bun run check && bun run test:showcase
scripts.verify:showcase: bun run build:all && bun run --filter './packages/showcase' build
scripts.build:showcase: bun run build:ts && bun run --filter './packages/showcase' build
bun run build:all && bun run --filter './packages/showcase' build
scripts.deploy:showcase: bun run build:showcase && bunx netlify deploy --dir=packages/showcase/dist --prod
